title: Jamaican Spicy Shrimp Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and savory mexican-inspired soup made with jamaican seasonings, shrimp, and noodles.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic, cook until softened.
Add jerk seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add broth, diced tomatoes, and shrimp. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until shrimp are cooked through.
Add noodles to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until noodles are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
